// COMMENT: Example configuration file for migrate.py — pass via --config config.json
// output_dir: Output directory for exported/converted content (default: artifacts/)
// workspace_id: Target Power BI Online workspace ID
// workspace_name: Target workspace name (auto-creates if workspace_id is null)
// content_types: Content types to migrate: powerbi, paginated, dataset, kpi, all
// folder: Optional PBIRS folder path to scope migration
// include_pattern: Regex pattern to include matching items
// exclude_pattern: Regex pattern to exclude matching items
// gateway_mapping: Path to gateway mapping JSON file
// skip_unsupported: Skip unsupported items instead of failing
// force_overwrite: Overwrite existing items in target workspace
// log_file: Optional file path for log output
// capacity_id: Premium/PPU capacity ID for paginated reports
// migrate_permissions: Migrate SSRS roles to workspace roles
